misc: Operates the Hector organization's digital media properties
Gotten increasingly close to winning the Hector Trophée but hasn't quite gotten it done yet
biography: Lasse, a formidable presence on the greens, brings a unique blend of skill and digital acumen to the Hector Trophée. Representing Tapiola Golf, Lasse's journey in the tournament is marked by both individual brilliance and team spirit.

With nine past appearances, Lasse is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, known for his strategic play and competitive zeal. His dedication to the sport is evident not only in his performance but also in his role behind the scenes, operating the Hector organization's digital media properties with the same precision he applies to his game.

Lasse's commitment has translated into notable success, including one coveted Hector Trophée victory and one Victor Trophy, awarded to the best individual player. Despite these accomplishments, Lasse remains driven, constantly refining his approach and seeking new ways to elevate his game. In recent years, Lasse has gotten increasingly close to adding to his trophy case, but has not quite gotten it done yet. As he prepares for his tenth appearance in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, Lasse aims to leverage his experience and talent to achieve further glory in the tournament.
